# Enhanced Subtitles
A mod which improves upon the functionality of vanilla's subtiles.

## Features
- Customizable subtitle scale
- Customizable subtitle position (with presets)
- Customizable subtitle background and font color
- Disable or enable the subtitles' visibility (via the mod. This does not disable them)
- Configuration GUI in-game by pressing "P" (can be changed in the Controls menu)

## Notes
If you want something similar for 1.20 Forge or Fabric check out Crendgrim's [Toggle Subtitles](https://modrinth.com/mod/toggle-subtitles) and [Move Subtitles](https://modrinth.com/mod/move-subtitles).

(there's also a mod for 1.8.9 with similar features)
